title: Panang Brise Chicken Thighs
description: A keto-friendly twist on Thai Panang Chicken with the addition of tenderized Brise chicken.

ingredients.name: Keto-friendly vegetables
ingredients.notes: Such as bell peppers, cauliflower, or mushrooms

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the Brise chicken thighs and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil to the pan.
Add the Panang curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the keto-friendly vegetables and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Return the chicken to the pan and stir to combine with the curry paste and vegetables.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the fish sauce and keto sweetener (if using).
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh basil and mint.
